note: On-board log collector / dictionary expander. Sub-ECUs/services emit COMPACT log refs (device-id, source-file-path-hash, line, args) over the vm/CAN transport; logging holds a dictionary ('device|file|line|LEVEL|message' lines, from an optional log_config.txt or a compiled-in default at DAT_0012fe70), looks each ref up, formats it, and emits a JSON line {ts,file_id,file,line,level,msg} to std::cout (-> systemd journald -> /var/log). MQTT broker localhost:1883 keepalive 60 (the source literal 5000 is the client +0x58 field, NOT the port). Reconstructed to behaviour-oriented C in main/logging/{src,include} (2 TUs, build clean). Decoded via a 10-agent workflow, adversarially verified.

named_functions.0x001074c0: main  // CLI getopt_long: -s/--service, -f/--filter <address|name>, optional [log_config.txt] positional (optind+1==argc). Builds service_env (vm_init + MQTT localhost:1883 + CAN + signals {2,4,6,15}), constructs LoggingService, runs, tears down.
named_functions.0x0010b2a0: logging_service_ctor  // stores {service_flag@0, filter@+1, can@+8, ostream(cout or arg)@+0x10, bus@+0x18}; registers the vm message handler (FUN_001127d0; throws 'Failed on a VM call ...' on error); loads the log dictionary: compiled-in default (logging_server.cpp:0x3c 'Using the compiled-in log configuration') or file (0x38 'Reading log configuration from %s'); parses each '\n'-line, splits on '|' into device|file|line|level|msg (else 0x45 'log config line ignored'), key=(line, file-path-hash[back-to-front *0x1003f], device) -> entry; dedup -> 0x72 'Duplicate log config for file %s (%d), line %d'.
named_functions.0x0010b250: logging_service_deinit  // tear down the registered handler + free the dictionary (OEM dtor).
named_functions.0x001127a0: logging_on_log_message  // per-message vm-callback trampoline: expand a compact ref (lookup (device,hash,line) -> level/file/msg, '???' on miss), build the JSON object {ts:'%H:%M:%S', file_id:<device>, file, line, level, msg} and emit to cout.
named_functions.0x00112d00: log_device_name  // device-id -> name (shared vm role enum: 0 CORE_SERVICES, 0x82 POWER, 0x84 RIDE, 0x88 UX, 0x8d MOTOR_CONTROL, 0x90 BLE, 0xa4 BATTERY_PRIMARY, 0xc1 ELOCK, 0xfb PING, 0xff TEST; else 'invalid enum value').
named_functions.0x0011d580: mqtt_client_ctor  // common::MQTTClient ctor; connects FUN_00129940(self, host, 0x75b=1883, 0x3c=60) = localhost:1883 keepalive 60; the literal 5000 passed by the builder is the client +0x58 field, NOT the port; 'Mosquitto connect error: <rc>' throw.

data.0x0012fe70: compiled-in default log config (DAT) — newline-joined 'device|file|line|LEVEL|message' dictionary for all sub-ECU + libvm/lib sources

vendor_deferred: common::ServiceEnv / MQTTClient / vm transport, std::map/string/ifstream, nlohmann-json, libstdc++/libc.
